Qualcomm's stock rose over 4% following the announcement, and the company's focus on AI on personal devices could significantly increase demand for its products.

title: Qualcomm Schedules Third Quarter Fiscal 2023 Earnings Release and Conference Call
text: SAN DIEGO , July 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Qualcomm Incorporated (NASDAQ: QCOM) today announced that it will publish the Company's financial results for its third quarter fiscal 2023 on Wednesday, August 2, 2023, after the close of the market on the Company's Investor Relations website, at https://investor.qualcomm.com/financial-information.
